lessons.title: First Steps with Python
lessons.description: Display 'Hello, World!' with the print function. Your first step in programming.

lessons.title: Variables and Calculations
lessons.description: Store data in variables and perform calculations.

lessons.title: Data Types and Conversion
lessons.description: Understand data types like integers, floats, and strings.

lessons.title: User Input
lessons.description: Create programs that receive input from users.

chapters.title: Conditional Statements
chapters.description: Learn to control program flow with conditions

lessons.title: Basic Conditionals
lessons.description: Use if statements to change behavior based on conditions.

lessons.title: else and elif
lessons.description: Handle multiple conditions effectively.

lessons.title: Logical Operators
lessons.description: Create complex conditions with and and or.

lessons.title: for Loop Basics
lessons.description: Master repetition with for loops.

lessons.title: Advanced for Loops
lessons.description: Use range and loop calculations effectively.

lessons.title: while Loops
lessons.description: Learn loops that continue while conditions are true.

chapters.title: Data Structures
chapters.description: Learn to work with collections of data

lessons.title: List Basics
lessons.description: Manage multiple pieces of data with lists.

lessons.title: List Operations
lessons.description: Add, remove, and sort list items.

lessons.title: for Loops and Lists
lessons.description: Process each element in a list with loops.

lessons.title: Dictionary Basics
lessons.description: Manage data with key-value pairs.

lessons.title: Function Basics
lessons.description: Create your own functions to organize code.

lessons.title: Advanced Functions
lessons.description: Master parameters and return values.

chapters.title: Practical Projects
chapters.description: Apply your knowledge to build real programs

lessons.title: Text-Based Game
lessons.description: Create a fun game while learning programming.

lessons.title: Data Aggregation Program
lessons.description: Build a program to collect and analyze data.

lessons.title: File Operations Basics
lessons.description: Learn to read and write files.

lessons.title: Final Project
lessons.description: Design and build your own program from scratch.
